violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. At time of inspection they did not have any sanitation process for wiping down food contact surfaces. Maintain a sanitation process for surfaces any time you are in operation.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Due to a power issue the pump for the hand wash sink was not working. Until the electrical situation is resolved they are using hand dispensers of and bottled water for handwashing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. -The finish floor had a few slits in the linoleum making cleaning difficult. Floors must be finished to be a smooth cleanable surface.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Discovered an insect spray bottle in the cabinet above the sink. Insecticides are not allowed in food prep areas.
